abilities.name: synchronize
abilities.description: Copies burns, paralysis, and poison received onto the Pokémon that inflicted them.

effectChanges.description: Cannot influence the natures of Pokémon encountered by interacting with them on the overworld.
Passes back bad poison as regular poison.

abilities.name: early-bird
abilities.description: Makes sleep pass twice as quickly.

abilities.name: magic-bounce
abilities.description: Reflects most non-damaging moves back at their user.
